name: basic-patch-data+sysmon
description: Same external memory patch as basic-patch-data, but with Sysmon subscribed alongside Microsoft-Windows-Kernel-Process. Hypothesis: kernel-process emits nothing (already confirmed in earlier runs); Sysmon emits a ProcessAccess event (Event 10) for ProcessToolkit opening a handle to TestTarget with PROCESS_VM_WRITE in the desired-access mask. This is the first run in which external memory patching becomes visible to the telemetry pipeline.

extra.notes: Requires Sysmon installed with experiments/sysmon-config.xml. Without Sysmon the run is equivalent to basic-patch-data (empty trace).
